prompt: Implement a Python fib(n) function (Fibonacci) with 3 pytest cases in /tmp/rocky-eval-sdd. Use Tier 2 default Codex SDD path.
expected_behavior: With-skill subagent should source swarm-transport.sh, swarm_spawn_agent a Codex pane in /tmp/rocky-eval-sdd, swarm_pipe_prompt with 'superpowers:subagent-driven-development' invocation, swarm_poll_result for result.md, verify Status: DONE + files changed list.
assertions: With-skill subagent spawned a real Codex pane via swarm_spawn_agent
With-skill subagent piped a prompt mentioning 'superpowers:subagent-driven-development'
Codex actually loaded the Superpowers SDD skill (verified by SDD output structure: implementer step + test step)
A result.md file was written by Codex with Status: DONE
fib.py exists in /tmp/rocky-eval-sdd with a working fib(n) function
test_fib.py exists with at least 3 pytest cases
With-skill subagent killed the Codex pane on cleanup
